title: GrowGeneration Corp (GRWG) Q3 2024 Earnings Results
text: GrowGeneration reported challenging Q3 2024 results with net revenue of $50 million, down from $53.5 million in Q2 2024 and $55.7 million in Q3 2023. The company posted a net loss of $11.4 million, worsening from a $7.3 million loss in the prior-year quarter. Gross profit margins compressed significantly to 21.6% from 29.1% year-over-year, primarily due to inventory costs and store liquidation sales. Despite revenue declines, the company achieved a notable milestone with a 12.5% increase in same-store sales, marking the first positive growth in three years. This improvement reflects successful customer retention following store closures. The company's proprietary brand portfolio expanded to 23.8% of cultivation and gardening sales, up from 19.4%, with management projecting this reaches 35% of sales next year with higher margins than legacy products. GrowGeneration closed 19 underperforming locations, reducing its store footprint from approximately 65 to 31 operational stores. Despite financial headwinds, the company maintained a strong balance sheet with $55.2 million cash with no debt as of September 30, 2024. Management is launching a B2B e-commerce portal to enhance customer experience and streamline operations, expected to optimize inventory management and increase margins. The company reiterated full-year 2024 revenue guidance of $190 to $195 million.
